final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the Changan Qiyuan Q06 vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation cover design, editorial layout with subtle depth and transparency effects, modern Chinese automotive branding aesthetic
Composition: wide landscape format with title and subtitle prominently placed in upper-left or centered, generous negative space for text overlay, layered translucent background elements
Subject: Changan Qiyuan Q06 vehicle silhouette or abstract automotive form, subtle and elegant rather than dominant
Scene/backdrop: ethereal atmospheric background with depth — soft gradients, light rays, or misty landscape suggesting origin and journey, translucent layered effects creating "通透" (transparency) sensation
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, serene and premium mood, sense of anticipation and new beginnings
Color palette: deep navy or midnight blue as base, silver or white accents, subtle warm highlights suggesting sunrise/dawn
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must accommodate both main title and subtitle placement; background must remain readable when text overlaid; suitable for 16:9 presentation slide format
Avoid: busy cluttered backgrounds, aggressive sporty aesthetics, cartoonish vehicle illustrations, watermark, generic stock photo look
